content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('EDW.DIM_PHONES')  IS NOT NULL 
DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_PHONES]

GO

CREATE TABLE EDW.DIM_PHONES
(
PhoneId NVARCHAR(64),
Phone NVARCHAR(64),
PhoneDescription NVARCHAR(255),
Active INT,
SortOrder INT,
SubSourceID NVARCHAR(64),
LP_SubSourceID INT,
LP_PhoneId INT,
Division NVARCHAR(100),
LastUpdatedTS DATETIME
);
